summary: This is a very brief technical update post from 2004 where Dan Shapiro notes that Feedburner is troubleshooting missing newlines in his blog's new RSS feed. The post is essentially a status update to readers experiencing feed issues. It thanks readers for their patience and points them to subscription options. There is no substantive argument or analysis in this post.
key_points: Feedburner was troubleshooting missing newlines in the blog's RSS feed
The post serves as a brief status update to affected readers
money_quotes: The good folks at Feedburner are troubleshooting the missing newlines in the new feed.
key_insight: This is a minor technical status update about RSS feed formatting issues, with no substantive content to analyze.
